biz.title: Last chance to apply — Startup Battlefield Australia applications close July 6
biz.summary: If you're going to apply for Startup Battlefield Australia, now is the time. Applications close July 6, and once the deadline passes, the opportunity is gone.

biz.summary: AI has made it a lot harder for tech companies like Amazon and Google to deliver on their net-zero pledges.

biz.title: Travel app Hopper to pay $35M in FTC settlement over ‘unfairly’ charging hidden fees
biz.summary: Hopper will pay $35 million to settle FTC allegations that it used deceptive “dark patterns” to hide fees and mislead travelers about the costs and benefits of services.

paper.title: Distributed Attacks in Persistent-State AI Control
paper.summary: As AI coding agents become more autonomous, they increasingly ship code iteratively, with the codebase persisting across sessions. This persistence creates a new attack surface: a misaligned or prompt-injected agent can distribute attacks across pull requests (PRs) and time its payload for the PR wi

paper.title: LACUNA: A Testbed for Evaluating Localization Precision for LLM Unlearning
paper.summary: LLMs memorize sensitive training data, including personally identifiable information (PII), creating a pressing need for reliable post hoc removal methods. Unlearning has emerged as a promising solution, with state-of-the-art(SOTA) methods often following a localize-first, unlearn-second paradigm th

paper.title: Program-as-Weights: A Programming Paradigm for Fuzzy Functions
paper.summary: Many everyday programming tasks resist clean rule-based implementation, such as alerting on important log lines, repairing malformed JSON, or ranking search results by intent, and are increasingly outsourced to large language model APIs at the cost of locality, reproducibility, and price. paper.title: Online Safety Monitoring for LLMs
paper.summary: Despite alignment training, LLMs remain prone to generating unsafe outputs at deployment time. Monitoring outputs online and raising an alarm when safety can no longer be assumed is therefore critical. paper.title: ReContext: Recursive Evidence Replay as LLM Harness for Long-Context Reasoning
paper.summary: Understanding and reasoning over long contexts has become a key requirement for deploying large language models (LLMs) in realistic applications. paper.title: What LLM Agents Say When No One Is Watching: Social Structure and Latent Objective Emergence in Multi-Agent Debates
paper.summary: LLM agents will increasingly act in socially structured settings where role, audience, and relational context can shape what is advantageous or costly to say. paper.title: Reasoning LLM Improves Speaker Recognition in Long-form TV Dramas

paper.title: DemoPSD: Disagreement-Modulated Policy Self-Distillation
